chunks.text: Gireeja Ranade honored for outstanding mentorship of GSIs - EECS at Berkeley EECS Teaching Professor Gireeja Ranade has received the Faculty Award for Outstanding Mentorship of GSIs. The annual award, which is sponsored by the Graduate Council’s Advisory Committee for GSI Affairs and the GSI Teaching & Resource Center, recognizes faculty who have provided GSIs outstanding teaching and pedagogical mentorship at Berkeley and in preparing for teaching in future careers. Categories Education Faculty Honors View Open Faculty Positions
